Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「タルー！ どうする？[NL]タル  「うーん…[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:[Taru]! What now?[NL][Taru]:Hmmm...[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「つよきだなー タルー！[NL]タル  「おう！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:You're confident,[NL][Taru]![NL][Taru]:Yeah![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「タルー！アイテム1コで だいじょうぶか？[NL]タル  「まかせろ ほんまる！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:[Taru]! Are you[NL]okay with just 1 item?[NL][Taru]:Leave it to me![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「みエッチんかー おれも ほしいぜー！[NL]タル  「ほんまる ちょっと スケブ…[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:Mi-etchin! I[NL]want that too![NL][Taru]:[Honmaru], you pervert...[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「イキフキカエルかー ようじんぶかいぜ！[NL]タル  「おう！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:Ikifukikaeru?[NL]You're being cautious![NL][Taru]:Yeah![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「タルー！ いっきにゴールだぜー！[NL]タル  「よし！ テレペテトつかう！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:[Taru]! Warp straight[NL]to the goal![NL][Taru]:Okay! Telepeteto![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「アイテム3つとは ふとっぱらだぜー！[NL]タル  「おう！ オレ ふとっぱら！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:3 items? You[NL]are so generous![NL][Taru]:Yeah! I'm generous![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「タルー！ アイテム つかいすぎだぜー！[NL]タル  「………[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:[Taru]! You're using[NL]too many items![NL][Taru]:.........[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: スパードと ジャンピが ボワーアッピするよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Speed and Jump will[NL]power up![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: みずのなかでも うごきやすくなるよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You will be able to[NL]move easily underwater![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: そらを とべるようになるよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You will be able to[NL]fly in the sky![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: かくしたこやきが みえるようになるよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Hidden Takoyaki will[NL]become visible![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ちょっとのあいだ むてきに なれるよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You will be invincible[NL]for a short time![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: いっかいなら てきにあたっても へいきになるよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You can take 1 hit[NL]without getting hurt![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ゴールまで いっきに ワーピできるよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You can warp straight[NL]to the goal![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: このマッピのとくちょうを おしえてくれるよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: I will tell you about[NL]this stage's features![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: そのアイテムは もってないよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You don't have that[NL]item![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: テレペテトは ほかのといっしょに つかえないよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Telepeteto cannot be[NL]used with other items![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: いだてんそくん・くろーるけーきくん・つばさ は[NL]どれか1コしか えらべないよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Idatensokun, Crawl-cake,[NL]and Wings...[NL]You can only pick 1![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「タルー！ がんばれよー！[NL]タル  「おう！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]:[Taru]! Good luck![NL][Taru]:Yeah![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: それは もうえらんでいるよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You have already[NL]selected that![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: リフトのうごきにきをつけてね！[0x33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Watch out for the[NL]moving lifts![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ゆきであしもとがすべるからきをつけてね！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: The snow makes it[NL]slippery, so be careful![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: あわてないでかくじつにすすめばだいじょうぶ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Don't panic! Move steadily[NL]and you'll be fine![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: とくにむずかしくないとおもうわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: I don't think it's[NL]particularly difficult![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: じかんにちゅういしてね！[0x33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Pay attention to the[NL]time limit![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: おちついてすすんでね！[0x33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Stay calm and proceed![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: がんばってね！[0x33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Do your best![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: きをつけてね！[0x33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Be careful![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: あしもとにちゅういしてすすんでね！[0x33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Watch your step as[NL]you go![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: このステージのどこかにベーナスルームがあるわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: There is a bonus room[NL]hidden in this stage![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: あんまりのんびりしているとじかんぎれに[NL]なってしまうかもしれないわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: If you take too long,[NL]you might run out of time![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: たこやきがどっさりのステージよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: This stage is full of[NL]Takoyaki![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: きくんだぁをつかうとらくにすすめるとおもうわ゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Using Kikundaa will make[NL]it easier to proceed.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ぶんしんライトくんをつかうとらくにすすめると[NL]おもうわ゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Using Bunshin Light-kun[NL]will make it easier.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: いんりょくんをうまくつかってすすんでね！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Use Inryokun well to[NL]proceed![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: まほうをじょうずにつかいわけてすすむのよ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Use your magic wisely[NL]to progress![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: せきりょくんをつかうとあんしんして[NL]すすめるとおもうわ゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Using Sekiryokun will[NL]make you feel safe.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: あまぐもたろうでひをけしてしまえば[NL]らくちんよ゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: If you put out the fire[NL]with Amagumo Tarou...[NL]it'll be a breeze.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: かぜかぜうちわくんでてきをふきとばすといいわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: It's a good idea to blow[NL]enemies away with[NL]Kazekaze Uchiwa-kun![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: みエッチんをつかうとらくにすすめるはずよ゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Using Mi-etchin will[NL]make it easier to proceed.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: イキフキカエルをつかったほうがいいとおもうわ゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: I think it's better to[NL]use Ikifukikaeru.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: どこかにあるむてきたこやきをうまくつかってね゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Make good use of the[NL]invincible Takoyaki[NL]hidden somewhere.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: いだてんそくんをつかうといいかもしれないわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: It might be a good idea[NL]to use Idatensokun![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ボワーアッピルジュースをつかうと[NL]いいかもしれないわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: It might be a good idea[NL]to use Power-Apple Juice![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: もうひといきよ！がんばってね！[0x33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Just a little more![NL]Do your best![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: あとはんぶんよおちついてすすんでね！[0x33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You're halfway there![NL]Stay calm and proceed![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: それをもうひとつ[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You need one more of[NL]that![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: このステージできっといいことがあるわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: I'm sure something good[NL]will happen in this stage![3F]
